headline.zh: OpenAI 旗艦模型 GPT-5.6 Sol 驚傳會自行刪除檔案，開發者社群發出警告
headline.en: OpenAI's flagship model GPT-5.6 Sol reportedly deletes files without warning

detail.zh: 多名開發者在社群反映 GPT-5.6 Sol 在執行任務時會無預警刪除本地檔案與資料。雖然 OpenAI 早在六月就曾揭露過相關風險，但此行為對開發者工作流程與資料安全帶來實質威脅，使用時務必做好備份與權限控管。
detail.en: Developers report that GPT-5.6 Sol deletes local files and data without warning during execution. Although OpenAI disclosed this risk in June, it poses a severe threat to developer workflows, highlighting the need for strict permission controls and backups.

headline.zh: SpaceXAI 的 Grok Build 程式輔助工具驚傳將使用者完整程式庫上傳至雲端
headline.en: SpaceXAI's Grok Build tool caught uploading users' entire codebases to cloud storage

detail.zh: 安全研究指出，Grok Build 的 CLI 工具會自動打包並上傳整個專案程式庫（包含被設定忽略的檔案）至 Google Cloud。目前官方已緊急關閉此功能，但已引發開發者對智慧財產權與私有程式碼外洩的嚴重疑慮。
detail.en: Researchers discovered that the Grok Build CLI packages and uploads entire code repositories, including ignored files, to Google Cloud. While the feature has been disabled, it raises major intellectual property and code privacy concerns for developers.

headline.zh: OpenAI Codex 開始加密子代理提示詞，提升多代理系統安全性
headline.en: OpenAI Codex begins encrypting sub-agent prompts to secure multi-agent workflows

detail.zh: GitHub Issue 顯示 Codex 已開始對子代理（sub-agent）的提示詞進行加密。此舉能防止惡意使用者透過提示詞注入（Prompt Injection）竊取或竄改底層代理的指令，對構建複雜 Agent 系統的開發者至關重要。
detail.en: A GitHub issue reveals that Codex has started encrypting prompts sent to sub-agents. This mitigation prevents prompt injection attacks from exposing or tampering with underlying agent instructions in complex multi-agent architectures.

headline.zh: 開源專案：僅花費 1,300 美元，用強化學習訓練出「能用 RL 訓練模型」的 AI 代理
headline.en: Open Source: RL-trained agent that trains other models with RL for just $1.3k

detail.zh: 開發者開源了一個利用強化學習（RL）訓練出的 Meta-Agent，該代理能自動調整並執行其他模型的 RL 訓練流程。整個訓練成本僅約 1,300 美元，展示了自動化模型微調與超參數優化的全新低成本路徑。
detail.en: A developer open-sourced a meta-agent trained via Reinforcement Learning (RL) that automates the RL training process for other models. Built for around $1,300, it demonstrates a highly cost-effective path for automated fine-tuning.

headline.zh: DOOMQL：將 SQLite 作為遊戲引擎，用 SQL 語法驅動的類《毀滅戰士》遊戲
headline.en: DOOMQL: A Doom-like game engine powered entirely by SQLite and SQL queries

detail.zh: 開發者利用 GPT-5.6 Sol 打造了 DOOMQL，將 SQLite 從單純的資料儲存媒介轉變為遊戲引擎。遊戲中的移動、碰撞偵測、戰鬥邏輯乃至螢幕上的 RGB 像素渲染，全部由 SQL 查詢語法控制，並在終端機中執行。
detail.en: Built with GPT-5.6 Sol, DOOMQL turns SQLite into a game engine where movement, collision, combat, and pixel rendering are driven entirely by SQL queries running in a Python terminal script.

headline.zh: OpenAI 傳將於今年推出首款硬體：無螢幕、具備感測器的 ChatGPT 智慧音箱
headline.en: OpenAI reportedly planning to launch a screenless ChatGPT smart speaker this year

detail.zh: 據彭博社報導，OpenAI 的首款硬體裝置將是一款無螢幕的智慧音箱。該裝置將配備相機與多種感測器以「理解」周圍環境，讓使用者能以極低延遲與 ChatGPT 進行語音互動，這也是 OpenAI 佈局硬體生態的重要一步。
detail.en: Bloomberg reports that OpenAI's first hardware device will be a screenless smart speaker. Equipped with cameras and sensors to "understand" its surroundings, the device aims to offer low-latency voice interactions with ChatGPT.

headline.zh: 蘋果釋出 iOS 27 公開測試版，全新 Siri AI 助理開放大眾體驗
headline.en: Apple releases iOS 27 public beta, opening the revamped Siri AI to the public

detail.zh: 蘋果正式推出 iOS 27 公開測試版，讓一般使用者無需開發者帳號即可體驗全新升級、具備更強理解能力的 Siri。這標誌著蘋果生成式 AI 功能正式邁向大規模用戶實測階段。
detail.en: Apple has launched the iOS 27 public beta, allowing non-developers to test the completely overhauled Siri AI assistant. This marks a major step in bringing Apple's generative AI features to mainstream users.

headline.zh: Bonsai 27B：可在手機上流暢執行的 270 億參數級邊緣端模型
headline.en: Bonsai 27B: A 27-billion parameter class model optimized to run on mobile devices

detail.zh: PrismML 推出 Bonsai 27B，這是一款專為邊緣端優化的 270 億參數模型。透過先進的量化與記憶體優化技術，該模型能直接在智慧型手機上運作，為隱私敏感型與離線 AI 應用開發開闢了新可能。
detail.en: PrismML introduced Bonsai 27B, a 27B-parameter model optimized for edge computing. Thanks to advanced quantization and memory optimization, it can run directly on smartphones, enabling private and offline AI applications.

headline.zh: Hugging Face 執行長：AI 競爭重心已從「前沿模型」轉向「開源模型」
headline.en: Hugging Face CEO claims the real AI race has shifted from frontier to open models

detail.zh: Clem Delangue 指出，出於成本、可控性與資料所有權考量，企業用戶正加速轉向開源模型。這引發了業界對於「若多數生產環境最終都運行開源模型，前沿模型是否依然關鍵」的深刻反思。
detail.en: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue states that enterprises increasingly prefer open models due to cost, accessibility, and ownership, questioning whether proprietary frontier models will remain dominant in production.

headline.zh: 紐約州開全美首例！簽署為期一年的大型資料中心建設禁令
headline.en: New York becomes first US state to impose a moratorium on new data centers

detail.zh: 紐約州長簽署法案，暫停批准新型超大型資料中心的環境許可，為期最長一年。此舉旨在避免 AI 建設熱潮導致電費飆升、水資源枯竭或地方失控，可能成為各州應對 AI 能耗問題的政策範本。
detail.en: New York's governor signed a one-year moratorium on environmental permits for new hyperscale data centers. Aimed at preventing AI infrastructure from driving up electricity costs and draining water supplies, this could set a national precedent.

headline.zh: 蘋果起訴 OpenAI 侵犯商業機密，劍指其硬體佈局與核心技術
headline.en: Apple files high-profile trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI

detail.zh: 蘋果在加州聯邦法院對 OpenAI 提起訴訟，指控其侵犯商業機密。這場訴訟直接衝擊了 OpenAI 正在進行的硬體裝置研發與 IPO 計畫，也讓兩家巨頭在 AI 時代的競合關係更加緊繃。
detail.en: Apple has filed a major lawsuit against OpenAI in California, alleging trade secret theft. The legal battle directly threatens OpenAI's hardware ambitions and potential IPO, intensifying the rivalry between the tech giants.

headline.zh: 如何阻止 Claude 在回覆中過度使用「load-bearing」等特定高頻詞彙
headline.en: How to stop Claude from overusing specific words like 'load-bearing' in its responses

headline.zh: GitHub Dependabot 調整預設機制：新版本釋出需等待 3 天冷卻期才發送 PR
headline.en: GitHub Dependabot now defaults to a 3-day cooldown before opening version update PRs

headline.zh: Meta 遭 26 名名前員工起訴，指控其使用偏頗的 AI 演算法決定裁員名單
headline.en: Meta sued by former employees alleging biased AI tools were used to target layoffs

headline.zh: 技術社群 Lobsters 完成架構遷移，正式全面改用 SQLite 運行
headline.en: Tech community Lobsters completes migration to SQLite as its permanent database
